# fieldName

**Type**

A string that names a field of a line item.

## Declaration

```swift
string fieldName
```

## Discussion

Error objects that the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/Send-External-Purchase-Report] endpoint returns may include a `fieldName`.

## Error types

- **errorCode**: An integer value that represents an error in the External Purchase Server API.
- **errorMessage**: A string that describes an error.
